td.style: padding:12px 14px; border:1px solid #e0e0e0; color:#e74c3c; font-weight:bold; font-size:20px;

t.p: Your payment is secured and encrypted.

div.style: background:#fff3cd; border:1px solid #ffc107; border-radius:6px; padding:16px; text-align:center;
div.p:
No online payment methods available.
Please contact us to arrange payment for invoice .

t.p: Unable to find your payment. Please contact us.

Your payment of
has been received.
Invoice is fully paid. has been partially paid.

div.style: margin-top:24px; padding:16px; background:#f0fff4; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #b2dfdb;
div.p: A confirmation has been recorded. Thank you for your payment!

t.p: Your payment is being processed. You will receive a confirmation shortly.
Your payment was cancelled. Please try again or contact us for assistance.
Something went wrong with your payment. Please try again or contact us.
